title: Create no Assembly Required
description: it makes create aeronautics physics a bit more realistic
body:
![tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d7f8f00b6b115d902715101620233ff0a119950.jpeg)properly If the support is removed, the entire structure will collapse naturally.

Trees, towers, bridges, and custom builds will no longer float unrealistically when their base is broken. Instead, they will fall, tipping or collapsing under their own weight, creating dynamic and immersive destruction.<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Z46CNXp7oys" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
